acceptance: the branch is registered in authoritative approvedConcurrentScopes before merge
finalization re-verifies exact AP-13C.1c runtime and AP-13C.1d human quality reports rather than trusting summaries
the exact Qwen CPU and Mistral fallback profiles are bound to immutable model bundles and AP-14C evidence
a canonical COMPLETE Mistral fallback benchmark candidate may be materialized only from real verified evidence
Qwen primary remains PENDING_BENCHMARK until the required GPU_SHARED Q8_0 profile is independently verified
no CPU evidence can be relabeled as GPU evidence or satisfy the joint primary profile set
all output artifacts are deterministic, self-digested, metadata-only and bound to immutable external evidence
model admission remains PENDING_ADMISSION and production_operational_status remains NOT_ATTESTED
forbidden_capabilities: fabricated runtime, quality, bundle or storage evidence
marking the Qwen primary benchmark COMPLETE without the governed GPU profile
changing the AP-13C/AP-13D joint admission thresholds or required profile set
model admission, activation, routing, deployment or production attestation
model weights, GGUF files, raw prompts, raw responses or reviewer evidence in Git
